body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Since the last timestamp in ERA5 data is 11pm on Dec 31 of a given year, simulations will fail in the last hour unless we provide an extrapolation BC to LinearInterpolation(). Here we make it so we always use the periodic calendar, and describe for users how to change this if they want.

## To-do

-->

-->

- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

title: Use periodic calendar for ERA5

body:
This PR updates the calibration pipeline by

- generating the observations as part of the slurm/pbs scripts,
- enabling the diagnostics that can be calibrated right now,
- update the model interface,
- not enabling the `NaNCallback`,
- and logging parameters before solving the simulation.

TODO

- [x] Test calibration pipeline on either GCP or Derecho
title: Update calibration pipeline
